expectations.text: All three strategies are queried and their estimated total_us values are compared
expectations.evidence: strategy_comparison.md shows hashmap_27 (15326.76µs), sorted_first_fit (15336.76µs), preprocessed_map (15313.76µs) all computed and compared

expectations.text: The winning strategy is named and its advantage explained
expectations.evidence: preprocessed_map selected as winner; advantage explained as lowest decision overhead (~2µs vs ~15-25µs) since all strategies converge on same padded shape

expectations.text: The padded dims satisfy Mp >= 1537, Np >= 257, Kp >= 769
The final padded shape (Mp, Np, Kp) are each from their respective ALLOWED lists
expectations.evidence: Mp=2048 in ALLOWED_M, Np=512 in ALLOWED_N, Kp=1024 in ALLOWED_K

expectations.text: Phase 3 analysis mentions actual vs estimated latency comparison
expectations.evidence: analysis.md notes 0% error (simulation used profile lookup as both estimate and actual). Also notes padding 13611µs >> execution 1700µs (8x ratio). Correctly identifies this as the dominant cost.

expectations.text: Phase 4 appends a run record or explains it could not write
expectations.evidence: runs.json updated (confirmed by system-reminder showing new entry with 1700.23µs). Knowledge base also updated with 3 new dated bullets about M>1024 convergence.
